About This Story  

In this inspiring story, Amina and Rami face many challenges. They are refugees, separated from their parents. They wait a long time to be together again. This story is about family reunification, education, and hope. It shows how refugees can build new lives. Even in hard times, hope persists. Amina dreams of a better life, and she believes in new beginnings.  

Amina and her little brother, Rami, were torn from their home. They hid in the dark as loud sounds filled the night. They lost their parents in the chaos. Amina was scared but promised Rami she would keep him safe. Years passed in a new country. Amina worked hard in school and dreamed of a better life. One day, she received a letter. Their parents were alive! They would come to see them soon. Amina smiled, feeling hope bloom in her heart.  

Many refugees leave their homes to find safety. They often face long separations from family. Some children miss school and cannot continue their education. Others struggle to find food and shelter. Together, they hope for a better future and the chance to reunite with loved ones.
